news.t: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs

overview.description: The J P MORGAN Exchange Traded Fund Trust - California Tax Free Bond ETF (JCAL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund seeks to provide high after-tax total return for California residents consistent with moderate risk of capital. JCAL was launched on Jun 12, 2026 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs
data.text: This week J.P. Morgan Asset Management launched two actively managed municipal bond ETFs focused on California and New York debt, offering investors a way to earn tax-free income inside a more flexibl...
